CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER IDENTITY, name VARCHAR(100));
CREATE TABLE second_table (id INTEGER IDENTITY, test_id INTEGER REFERENCES test_table(id));
SET IDENTITY_COLUMN('test_table', 'id', (SELECT MAX(id) FROM (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE 'John%') AS subquery) + 10);
SET IDENTITY_COLUMN('test_table', 'id', (SELECT AVG(id) FROM test_table WHERE id < 500));
SET IDENTITY_COLUMN('test_table', 'id', (SELECT DISTINCT MAX(id) FROM test_table));
SET IDENTITY_COLUMN('second_table', 'test_id', (SELECT MIN(id) FROM test_table WHERE name = 'Alice'));
